document: Emergency Response Guidance for Aircraft Incidents Involving Dangerous Goods

drills.risk_to_occupants: As indicated by the drill letter(s)
drills.firefighting_procedure: All agents according to availability; use standard fire procedure

drills.inherent_risk: Gas, non-flammable, pressure may create hazard in fire
drills.risk_to_occupants: As indicated by the drill letter(s)
drills.spill_or_leak_procedure: Use 100% oxygen; establish and maintain maximum ventilation for "A", "i" or "P" drill letter
drills.firefighting_procedure: All agents according to availability; use standard fire procedure

drills.risk_to_occupants: Smoke, fumes and heat, and as indicated by the drill letter(s)
drills.spill_or_leak_procedure: Use 100% oxygen; establish and maintain maximum ventilation; no smoking; minimum electrics
drills.firefighting_procedure: All agents according to availability; no water on "W" drill letter

drills.inherent_risk: Spontaneously combustible or pyrophoric when exposed to air
drills.risk_to_occupants: Smoke, fumes and heat, and as indicated by the drill letter(s)
drills.spill_or_leak_procedure: Use 100% oxygen; establish and maintain maximum ventilation
drills.firefighting_procedure: All agents according to availability; no water on "W" drill letter
drills.additional_considerations: Possible abrupt loss of pressurization; minimum electrics if "F" or "H" drill letter

drills.inherent_risk: Oxidizer, may ignite other materials, may explode in heat of a fire
drills.risk_to_aircraft: Fire and/or explosion, possible corrosion damage
drills.risk_to_occupants: Eye, nose and throat irritation; skin damage on contact
drills.spill_or_leak_procedure: Use 100% oxygen; establish and maintain maximum ventilation
drills.firefighting_procedure: All agents according to availability; no water on "W" drill letter

drills.inherent_risk: Toxic, may be fatal if inhaled, ingested, or absorbed by skin
drills.risk_to_aircraft: Contamination with toxic liquid or solid
drills.risk_to_occupants: Acute toxicity, effects may be delayed
drills.spill_or_leak_procedure: Use 100% oxygen; establish and maintain maximum ventilation; do not touch without gloves
drills.firefighting_procedure: All agents according to availability; no water on "W" drill letter
drills.additional_considerations: Possible abrupt loss of pressurization; minimum electrics if "F" or "H" drill letter

drills.risk_to_occupants: Exposure to radiation, and personnel contamination
drills.spill_or_leak_procedure: Do not move packages; avoid contact
drills.additional_considerations: Call for a qualified person to meet the aircraft

drills.inherent_risk: Corrosive, fumes disabling if inhaled or in contact with skin
drills.risk_to_occupants: Eye, nose and throat irritation; skin damage on contact
drills.spill_or_leak_procedure: Use 100% oxygen; establish and maintain maximum ventilation; do not touch without gloves
drills.firefighting_procedure: All agents according to availability; no water on "W" drill letter
drills.additional_considerations: Possible abrupt loss of pressurization; minimum electrics if "F" or "H" drill letter

drills.inherent_risk: No general inherent risk; as indicated by the drill letter
drills.risk_to_aircraft: As indicated by the drill letter
drills.risk_to_occupants: As indicated by the drill letter
drills.spill_or_leak_procedure: Use 100% oxygen; establish and maintain maximum ventilation if "A" drill letter
drills.firefighting_procedure: All agents according to availability; no water on "W" drill letter

drills.inherent_risk: Gas, flammable, high fire risk if any ignition source present
drills.risk_to_occupants: Smoke, fumes and heat, and as indicated by the drill letter
drills.spill_or_leak_procedure: Use 100% oxygen; establish and maintain maximum ventilation; no smoking; minimum electrics

drills.inherent_risk: Infectious substances may affect humans or animals
drills.risk_to_occupants: Delayed infection to humans or animals
drills.spill_or_leak_procedure: Do not touch; call for a qualified person to meet the aircraft; minimum circulation and ventilation in affected area
drills.firefighting_procedure: All agents according to availability; no water on "Y" drill letter
drills.additional_considerations: Possible abrupt loss of pressurization; Quarantine may be required by national authority

drill_letter_key.W: IF WET GIVES OFF POISONOUS OR FLAMMABLE GAS
